'''ST-103'''<ref name="JKTCG" /> was a [[Human/Legends|Human]]<ref name="CSWE" /> who served as an [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Imperial]] [[Desert stormtrooper/Legends|sandtrooper]] [[Squad/Legends|squad]] leader<ref name="Pauldron">{{DB|organization|sandtroopers|sandtroopers}} confirms [[Color/Legends|orange]] [[Limb/Legends|shoulder]] [[Pauldron/Legends|pauldrons]] are indicative of sandtrooper squad leaders. Based on the visual evidence, this article treats ST-103 as a squad leader.</ref> assigned to a [[Garrison/Legends|garrison]] at [[Mos Eisley/Legends|Mos Eisley]]<ref name="JKTCG" /> on the [[Planet/Legends|planet]] [[Tatooine/Legends|Tatooine]]<ref name="DB">{{DB|location|moseisley|Mos Eisley}}</ref> during the [[Galactic Civil War/Legends|Galactic Civil War]]. During ST-103's assignment on Tatooine, the [[Stormtrooper/Legends|stormtrooper]] rode a [[Dewback/Legends|dewback]]. ST-103 was a [[Sabacc/Legends|sabacc]] player, and, like other stormtroopers assigned to [[Spaceport/Legends|spaceports]] such as Mos Eisley, frequented the [[Gambling/Legends|gaming]] tables when off-duty. ST-103 wore a full suit of [[Stormtrooper armor/Legends|stormtrooper armor]] and was armed with an [[E-11 blaster rifle/Legends|E-11 blaster rifle]].<ref name="JKTCG" />

==Behind the scenes==
ST-103 was mentioned on a card in [[Decipher]]'s [[2001]] ''[[Jedi Knights Trading Card Game]]''.<ref name="JKTCG" />
